clinical_recommendation.dose_adjustment: Standard clopidogrel dosing. No adjustment needed.
clinical_recommendation.cpic_guideline_reference: CPIC Guidelines for Clopidogrel and CYP2C19 - https://www.pharmgkb.org/documents/pa165990037

llm_generated_explanation.summary: This patient has a normal metabolizer (NM) phenotype for CYP2C19, indicated by the *1/*1 diplotype. They are expected to activate clopidogrel normally and achieve standard antiplatelet efficacy.
llm_generated_explanation.mechanism: CYP2C19 encodes a cytochrome P450 enzyme responsible for the bioactivation of clopidogrel. Normal metabolizers convert clopidogrel to its active metabolite efficiently, providing standard platelet inhibition.

quality_metrics.notes: Successfully parsed VCF. CYP2C19 *1/*1 diplotype inferred from homozygous reference call at rs4244285.
